---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution
How should it work? Include CLI examples, config snippets, or sketch of UI changes.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context
Links to related issues, external references, prior art.
